name: albumwm
description: Scrollable tiling extension for GNOME Shell

scripts.postbuild: cp -r schemas ui resources config metadata.json stylesheet.css LICENSE dist/ && glib-compile-schemas dist/schemas
scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -f albumwm@0iq.dev.zip && cd dist && zip -9r ../albumwm@0iq.dev.zip .
scripts.install:ext: npm run pack && gnome-extensions install --force albumwm@0iq.dev.zip
